title: Junior Instructional Designer at Resonance International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Resonance International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Resonance International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About Resonance International Enterprises:
Resonance International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Resonance International Enterprises!
